issue_title: fix: prevent mermaid temp render nodes from causing scrollbar flash and layout shift
issue_body_preview:
Mermaid's `render()` appends temporary `<div id="dmermaid-...">` elements to `document.body`. These nodes briefly participate in layout, inflating `scrollHeight` and causing a scrollbar flash / layout shift cycle.

- Added CSS rule across all three packages (`src/index.css`, `packages/markstream-vue
test_description_zh: 在页面中渲染包含 Mermaid 图表的 Markdown 内容，观察页面在 Mermaid 图表渲染过程中是否出现滚动条闪烁或页面布局抖动现象。
expected_result_zh: Mermaid 图表正常渲染完成，渲染过程中页面不会出现滚动条短暂闪现，也不会发生布局偏移/抖动，页面始终保持稳定的视觉状态。
